zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh de Hastings於1336年出生在英國諾福爾可格利姆斯頓時，他的父親Hugh Hastings27歲，母親Margery Foliot24歲。他於1351年與Margaret Everingham在英國諾福爾可艾爾辛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年9月在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾多卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh de Hastings于1336年出生在英国諾福爾可格利姆斯頓时，他的父亲Hugh Hastings27岁，母亲Margery Foliot24岁。他于1351年与Margaret Everingham在英国諾福爾可艾爾辛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年9月在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾多卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh de Hastings was born in 1336, in Grimston, Norfolk, England, his father, Hugh Hastings, was 27 and his mother, Margery Foliot, was 24. He married Margaret Everingham in 1351, in Elsing, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in September 1369, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 33, and was buried in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh de Hastings est né en 1336, à Grimston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Hastings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Foliot, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Everingham en 1351, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1369, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh de Hastings 1336 in Grimston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Hastings 27 und seine Mutter Margery Foliot 24. Er hat 1351 in Elsing, Norfolk, England Margaret Everingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im September 1369 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh de Hastings è nato il nel 1336 nel Grimston, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Hugh Hastings, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Foliot, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Everingham nel 1351, nel Elsing, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1369, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh de Hastingsが1336年にイギリスノーフォルクグリムストンで生まれた時，父Hugh Hastingsは27歳，母Margery Foliotは24歳であった。1351年にイギリスノーフォルクエルシングでMargaret Everinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年9月にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh de Hastings(이)가 1336년 영국 노르폴크 그림스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Hastings(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Foliot(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1351년 영국 노르폴크 엘징에서 Margaret Everingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 9월 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 돈카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh de Hastings nasceu em 1336, em Grimston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Hastings, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Foliot, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Everingham em 1351, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1369, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh de Hastings родился в 1336 г. в местности гримстон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Hastings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Foliot, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Everingham в 1351 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1369 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh de Hastings nació en 1336, en Grimston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Hastings, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Foliot, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Everingham en 1351, en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1369, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
